channel.title: Double Galley on Kitchen Remodel Ideas
channel.description: Recent content in Double Galley on Kitchen Remodel Ideas

item.title: Double Galley Kitchen Ideas
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: Double Galley Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 149 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } Installation Options: Tempzone Floor Heating Cables: @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.

item.title: Small Double Galley Kitchen

item.description: Kitchen Shape: Double Galley Flooring: Resilients, Vinyl and Luxury Vinyl Tile (LVT) Subfloor: Existing Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 136 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Roll: @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls.

item.title: Large Kitchen Floor Plan and Nook
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: Double Galley Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 238 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } “Hard flooring surfaces can be cold underfoot any time of year, but are especially so when the weather gets cooler.
